◎简　　介  

　　The Village of Middlevale is a feature-length, improvised mockumentary. The film revolves around a strange company of outcasts that give up their modern lives to found a medieval village called Middlevale. Witch burnings, blights, rivalries and hilarity ensue as we follow the group of incompetents over the course of a year.
